definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is just an acquaintance.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A person one knows slightly, but who is not a close friend.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person one knows slightly, but who is not a close friend.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is an advocate for free speech.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She is an advocate for free speech.
definitions.usage_context_en: A person who publicly supports or recommends a particular cause or policy.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person who publicly supports or recommends a particular cause or policy.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: There are many applicants for the job.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: There are many applicants for the job.
definitions.usage_context_en: A person who formally requests or applies for something, such as a job.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person who formally requests or applies for something, such as a job.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is the sole beneficiary.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A person who derives advantage from something, especially a trust, will, or life insurance policy.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person who derives advantage from something, especially a trust, will, or life insurance policy.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The shop has a wealthy clientele.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The shop has a wealthy clientele.
definitions.usage_context_en: All the clients of a business or professional person collectively.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: All the clients of a business or professional person collectively.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Each individual must sign the form.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Each individual must sign the form.
definitions.usage_context_en: A single human being as distinct from a group.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A single human being as distinct from a group.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Every participant received a medal.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A person who takes part in something.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person who takes part in something.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She was a witness to the crime.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She was a witness to the crime.
definitions.usage_context_en: A person who sees an event, typically a crime or accident, take place.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A person who sees an event, typically a crime or accident, take place.]
